description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, standing upright with hands resting on her hips. She has a high, rounded bun hairstyle and a slightly elongated face with large, expressive eyes. The figure is dressed in a long-sleeved, loose-fitting top and tight-fitting pants, paired with flat shoes. The proportions are exaggerated, with long legs and arms, and the overall design is cartoon-like. The surface appears smooth and matte, with no visible textures or accessories. The figure is not carrying any objects and has a neutral, confident posture.
description: A stylized adult female figure with a high bun, long-sleeved top, tight pants, and flat shoes, standing with hands on hips. The design is cartoon-like with smooth, matte surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, high bun, long-sleeved top, and hands on hips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, bun, and the curvature of the back and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, bun, and the fit of the top and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and body posture from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved pullover top and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with hands on hips
